narrative:
Pickerington Local Sd (Fairfield) school district has 40,676 registered voters, with 54.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.4%, a narrow Republican lean of 0.3 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +3.4% D−R vs -9.0% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
